facebook.caption: Tourists walk through Chợ đêm Phú Quốc once and leave. Locals go back every week. The difference? Knowing what to order, where to sit, and which stalls close early. Grilled seafood, fresh fruit shakes, and street snacks at prices that make no sense for an island this popular. 6,039 reviews and still feels like a real market, not a show. Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
facebook.video_caption: Watch the grill smoke roll past the stalls at Chợ đêm Phú Quốc. This is what a real island night market looks like. Not curated. Not quiet. Completely worth it.

instagram.caption: Locals go back to Chợ đêm Phú Quốc every week. Tourists visit once and wonder why they didn't stay longer. Don't be the tourist. Save this.
instagram.video_caption: Grill smoke, neon lights, 6,039 reviews. Chợ đêm Phú Quốc hits different after dark. Tag your travel buddy.

tiktok.caption: What the resort staff don't tell you about Chợ đêm Phú Quốc 👀 Real market, real prices, real good. #PhuQuoc #VietnamStreetFood #NightMarket #TravelTips

video_script.hook: What locals actually do at night.
scenes: Pan across crowded stall rows at dusk
Vendor hands over a paper bag of snacks
